creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please do not approve this yet. They just announced they are re-releasing  
5.0 because of a last minute bugfix (user roles couldn't look at schemas).  
They didn't change the version number, so now we need to get updated  
checksums. Do we put special info in the changelog as well to mention that  
this is the "real" 5.0?


Regards,


Mark
